title: MOAR Enchantments
body:
MOAR Enchantments adds more enchantments for player's minecraft armor and weapons!

- Vampire's Familiar — regenerates per hit
- Wind's Familiar — throws up the enemies that attacked you
- Fireflies' Familiar — burns the enemies that attacked you
- Wither's Familiar — deals more withering type damage and cancels the knockback on a hit
- God of War's Familiar — makes mobs attacked by you hit themselves
- Assassin's Familiar — deals more damage while sneaking, but cancels the knockback on a hit
- Phantom Pain — deals more damage for phantoms
- Serpent Fang — poisons the enemies
- Perception — allows you to see in the dark
- Confident Step — breaks the cobwebs in the block you are in
